Update admins.name: Update admins
Update admins.using: (( SELECT is_store_superadmin(admins.store_id) AS is_store_superadmin) OR (( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = id))

Auth admin can read admins for token hoo.name: Auth admin can read admins for token hook

Customers can insert own comment.name: Customers can insert own comment
Customers can insert own comment.withCheck:
((user_id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users
  WHERE ((users.id = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (users.store_id = blog_comments.store_id)))))

Update blogs.name: Update blogs
Update blogs.withCheck: (( SELECT is_store_admin(blogs.store_id) AS is_store_admin) OR ((submitted_by = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (is_customer_submission = true) AND (status = ANY (ARRAY['draft'::text, 'pending_review'::text]))))
Update blogs.using: (( SELECT is_store_admin(blogs.store_id) AS is_store_admin) OR ((submitted_by = ( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid)) AND (is_customer_submission = true) AND (status = ANY (ARRAY['draft'::text, 'pending_review'::text]))))

Customers can view own order items.name: Customers can view own order items
Customers can view own order items.using:
(order_id IN ( SELECT orders.id
   FROM orders
  WHERE (orders.customer_id = auth.uid())))

Admins can view and manage store order i.name: Admins can view and manage store order items

Admins can view and manage store orders.name: Admins can view and manage store orders

Read product_variants.name: Read product_variants
Read product_variants.using:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM products
  WHERE ((products.id = product_variants.product_id) AND (products.status = 'published'::text)))) OR ( SELECT is_store_admin(product_variants.store_id) AS is_store_admin))

Auth admin can read users for token hook.name: Auth admin can read users for token hook

Public can read coupon group links.name: Public can read coupon group links

Read memberships.name: Read memberships
Read memberships.using: ((( SELECT auth.uid() AS uid) = user_id) OR ( SELECT is_store_admin(user_group_members.store_id) AS is_store_admin))

public.customer_admin.name: customer_admin
public.customer_admin.definition: SELECT u.id, u.phone, u.email, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.created_at, u.updated_at, COALESCE(r.cnt, 0::bigint) AS review_count, COALESCE(b.cnt, 0::bigint) AS blog_count, COALESCE(r.cnt, 0::bigint) + COALESCE(b.cnt, 0::bigint) AS activity_count, u.store_id FROM users u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_reviews.user_id, count(*) AS cnt FROM product_reviews GROUP BY product_reviews.user_id) r ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT blogs.submitted_by, count(*) AS cnt FROM blogs WHERE blogs.is_customer_submission GROUP BY blogs.submitted_by) b ON b.submitted_by = u.id

public.enquiry_admin.name: enquiry_admin
public.enquiry_admin.definition: SELECT id, name, email, phone, subject, message, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, subject_detail, CASE status WHEN 'new'::text THEN 0 WHEN 'in_progress'::text THEN 1 WHEN 'resolved'::text THEN 2 WHEN 'archived'::text THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS status_rank, store_id FROM enquiries e
